currentUnderstanding: Coordinator-written summary of what is known about the target, based on prior memory, code reading, observed environment, and dedupe/intel checks. Do not let Proteus generate this.

selectedSurfaces.name: Specific bounded surface selected by the coordinator
selectedSurfaces.reason: Coordinator-written reason for selecting this surface now.
selectedSurfaces.revisitCondition: When this surface should be reopened after it is covered, killed, or deferred.

skippedSurfaces.name: Specific surface skipped this round
skippedSurfaces.reason: Coordinator-written reason for skipping, such as duplicate, low ROI, blocked, already covered, or out of scope.
skippedSurfaces.revisitCondition: Condition that would make this worth revisiting.

agentFronts.purpose: Bounded objective for this front, written by the coordinator.

stopConditions: Selected surfaces are exhausted with recorded evidence.
External blocker requires credentials or infrastructure.
replanTrigger: When fronts return, integrate evidence and have the coordinator write the next round input.
